title: Time Warp: The Temporal Enchantment
description: Tired of losing all your progress to an unexpected Creeper explosion or a sudden fall into the void? Time Warp introduces a powerful, game-changing enchantment that grants you a second chance at life by literally rewinding time!
body:
Tired of losing all your progress to an unexpected Creeper explosion or a sudden fall into the void? Time Warp introduces a powerful, game-changing enchantment that grants you a second chance at life by literally rewinding time!

 

Time Warp: The Temporal Enchantment
 

 

Overview
 

Tired of losing all your progress to an unexpected Creeper explosion or a sudden fall into the void? Time Warp introduces a powerful, game-changing enchantment that grants you a second chance at life by literally rewinding time!

 

 Key Feature: Temporal Resilience
 

The Time Warp enchantment provides the ultimate insurance policy. If you are wearing a full set of Time Warp enchanted armor and take fatal damage, the enchantment activates, saving you from death.

 

How it Works:
 

Snapshot System: The mod constantly saves a "snapshot" of your status every 5 ticks (4 times per second).

The Rewind: When you die, the mod retrieves the snapshot from 5 seconds ago and instantly restores your state, including:Health and HungerExact PositionFull Inventory and ArmorExperience (XP) Soon become balacend

How to Get the Enchantment
 

Time Warp is an extremely rare and powerful enchantment:

It cannot be obtained through the regular Enchantment Table.

It can only be found as a Treasure Enchantment in rare loot chests (Dungeons, Mineshafts, Strongholds) or traded with Expert-level Librarians.

Apply it to your armor using an Anvil.

The Time Warp: The Temporal Enchantment Team
